org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core

Class Message

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.arakhne.tinyMAS.core.Message
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Serializable
    Deprecated. 
    See "http://www.janus-project.org"

    @Deprecated
public class Message
extends Object
implements Serializable
    Message exchange by agents.
    Author:
    Stéphane GALLAND <galland@arakhne.org>, Nicolas GAUD <nicolas.gaud@utbm.fr>
    See Also:

    • Constructor Detail

      • Message

        public Message(AgentIdentifier from,
       AgentIdentifier to,
       Serializable content)
        Deprecated. 
        Parameters:
        from - is the emitter
        to - is the received
        content - is the content of the message.

    • Method Detail

      • isTypeOf

        public boolean isTypeOf(Class<? extends Serializable> type)
        Deprecated. 
        Replies if the content of this message has the specified type.
        Parameters:
        type - is the type to test against the message content
        Returns:
        true if the message content is an instance of the given type, otherwise false

      • getContent

        public <T extends Serializable> T getContent()
        Deprecated. 
        Replies the content.
        Type Parameters:
        T - is the type of the message content.
        Returns:
        the message content.
        Throws:
        ClassCastException - if the content could not be casted as type T.
